title: Boat 55W Car Charger with Dual Port USB-A and USB-C
description: Boat 55W Car Charger with Dual Port USB-A and USB-C; Supports QC, PD & PPS Advanced Charging Protocols | 12-Layer Smart IC Protection | Compact, Lightweight, Heat & Scratch Resistant (Carbon Black)

title: Involve DC Batman Car Mobile Holder
description: The Involve DC Batman Car Mobile Holder is the ultimate blend of fandom and function — a DC officially licensed dashboard mount that lets you rep Batman while keeping your phone secure on every drive. It features a 360° adjustable arm with a strong suction base, fitting most smartphones and compatible with any car dashboard. At ₹999 (down from ₹1,999), this is a steal for any DC fan who wants their car to look as cool as their collection.
